name: Krushak Assistance for Livelihood and Income Augmentation (KALIA)
eligibility_criteria: Small farmers, cultivators, and landless agricultural laborers.

name: Mukhyamantri Krishi Ashirwad Yojana
benefit_amount: ₹5,000 to ₹25,000 based on land acreage (1 to 5 acres).
eligibility_criteria: Small and marginal farmers of Jharkhand.

name: Bhavantar Bhugtan Yojana
benefit_amount: Compensation for the difference between MSP and Market Price.
eligibility_criteria: Farmers registered on the portal selling notified crops in Mandis.

name: Bangla Shasya Bima (BSB)
benefit_amount: 100% premium paid by State Govt for most crops.
eligibility_criteria: All farmers in West Bengal (no premium for food/oilseeds).

name: Mukhya Mantri Khet Suraksha Yojana
benefit_amount: Subsidy on solar fencing (low intensity electric fence) to protect crops.
eligibility_criteria: Small/marginal farmers facing crop damage from wild animals.

name: Rajiv Gandhi Kisan Nyay Yojana
benefit_amount: ₹9,000 per acre input subsidy for Paddy and other crops.
eligibility_criteria: Farmers registered for crop procurement in Chhattisgarh.

name: Surajdhara Yojana
benefit_amount: High-quality seeds of Oilseeds/Pulses at subsidized rates/exchange.

name: Namo Shetkari Mahasanman Nidhi
benefit_amount: Additional ₹6,000 per year (on top of PM-Kisan).
eligibility_criteria: Same as PM-Kisan beneficiaries in Maharashtra.

name: Kisan Sarvhit Bima Yojana
benefit_amount: ₹5 Lakh accidental insurance + ₹2.5 Lakh medical cover.
eligibility_criteria: Heads of farming families with income less than ₹75,000/year.

name: Bhagwan Valmiki Ji Tirath Sthal Scheme
eligibility_criteria: Residents of Punjab engaged in farming (Senior Citizens).
